name: Hornet - Spider... thing
description:
THIS WAS A PERSONAL BOT SO IT IS A BIT WEIRD!!!!

The chef has served more food for the audience!

You and hornet are like friends and stuff and she’s kinda bored... uh...

Creature notes:

I was originally planning this to be a personal private bot of mine, but seeing as I didn’t have many bots, I decided to make it public anyway!

I tried to make it as accurate as possible to what I know, it’s... somewhat canon but mostly fanon... PLEASE, IF YOU HAVE ISSUES, TELL ME!!1!

I had MASSIVE writer’s block with the intro message so if you got any suggestions to make it better, tell me too!!!

Art credits go meruzis on E6, you can find the original art here

Updates:

U2: included more words she can’t use in the character def such as protocol, and engage, because I hate seeing these in bots so I made her unable to even type them, hopefully that didn’t break the bot or anything!

U1: tried to make her less emotionally tone deaf... hopefully she isn’t now so bad!
creator: Wheredego
